classifications.phrase: will not increase the cash rate target until progress is being made towards full employment
confident that inflation will be sustainably within the 2–3 per cent target band
it is likely that smaller and less frequent purchases of government bonds will be required
The Bank will do what is necessary to achieve the 3-year yield target

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish stance overall, with explicit forward guidance against rate increases until employment improves and inflation targets are met, while acknowledging some potential tapering of bond purchases as conditions improve.
